notes: Lode declares abstract resource requirements only.
Core matches requirements against current Harbor facts.
Harbor owns browser identity, runtime session, page source, and evidence refs.

matching_semantics.matched_meaning: Current Harbor facts satisfy one declared profile for admission.
matching_semantics.unmatched_meaning: Current Harbor facts are insufficient; this is not a package-invalid signal.
matching_semantics.invalid_contract_meaning: The declaration uses forbidden fields or contradicts read requirements.

resource_requirement_profiles.description: Read BOSS Zhipin job search result cards from an already logged-in browser page and return detail refs.

required_harbor_facts.purpose: Core has a bound browser surface for the read attempt.
The bound page can navigate to, or already sits on, www.zhipin.com.
Harbor/Core can confirm an existing BOSS job seeker login without Lode storing account state.
The BOSS Zhipin web app is hydrated enough for read-only extraction.
The current origin can read BOSS zpgeek endpoints through the existing browser identity.
Core can bind extracted fields to source refs.
Harbor can provide a snapshot evidence ref without inlining evidence.
No visible verification, CAPTCHA, or safety challenge blocks the page.

matched.meaning: At least one requirement profile matches current Harbor facts.

unmatched.meaning: The declaration is valid but current Harbor facts cannot satisfy the read profile.

invalid_contract.meaning: The resource declaration is malformed or contradicts the package operation mode.

failure_class_mapping.not_logged_in: User must log in manually in the bound browser.
failure_class_mapping.identity_insufficient: The bound identity is not a job seeker page state accepted for read-only job access.
failure_class_mapping.captcha_required: Manual verification is required; do not bypass it.
failure_class_mapping.page_not_ready: Wait for hydration or refresh the route.
failure_class_mapping.input_missing_security_id: Use a job-search detail_ref with securityId.
failure_class_mapping.job_expired: The selected job is no longer available.
failure_class_mapping.permission_denied: Current identity lacks permission for this read.
failure_class_mapping.site_changed: Refresh source shape, fixture, normalizer, or post-check requirements.
failure_class_mapping.network_resource_unavailable: Refresh runtime, source, and evidence refs.

non_goals: No Harbor live fact matching in Lode.
No runtime acquisition or fallback ordering.
